top_signals.title: Here we go again with Nvidia falling on earnings. What the sellers are missing
top_signals.summary: Nvidia's stock is down again after earnings. The sellers are missing the bigger picture.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Argentina’s Surge in Foreign Reserves Risks Reigniting Inflation
top_signals.summary: There are, by all appearances, more than enough dollars flowing into Argentina for the country to fulfill its pledge to replenish its depleted foreign reserves. Each week, they pour in, the result of factors such as a boom in commodity exports and corporate bond sales.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: Treasury Minutes – May 2026
top_signals.summary: Government departments respond to the Public Accounts Committee reports through a Treasury minute.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Turkey’s FX Sales Reach $6 Billion After Opposition Ruling
top_signals.summary: Turkish state lenders sold about $6 billion to defend the lira on Thursday, about half shortly after a court decision that removed the main opposition party’s leadership, according to traders familiar with the transactions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: LIV Golf seeks to raise up to $350 million from investors as post-PIF reality sets in
top_signals.summary: LIV Golf is preparing to take its updated business plan and investor pitch on the road as soon as Thursday, in an effort to raise fresh capital.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Mamdani's Tax Plans May Hurt New York, Dimon Says
top_signals.summary: "People think that somehow being anti-business is going to help the city, it’s not." JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon criticized plans by New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani to place more taxes on the rich. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: US quantum investment includes groups tied to Trump administration
top_signals.summary: Beneficiaries of $2bn push include start-up backed by firm linked to Trump family and another taken public by Pentagon official
